title: House, Home
questions: Are you a 'house and home' person?
What's your favourite thing about your home?
What is your dream home?
What home improvements would you like to make to your home?
Are you happy with the colour scheme and furniture in your home?
Would you rather live in a house or an apartment?
Do you agree that 'home is where the heart is'?
Do you like being at home alone?
What are the differences between a house and a home?
Do you like the houses in other countries?
What comes to mind when you hear the word 'home'?
Are you a stay-at-home person or a going-out person?
Do you do homework and housework?
Do you or would you like to own your own home?
Are you house proud?
Is there anything you hate about your home?
Do you get jealous of other people's homes?
Would you like to work at home?
Do you like the location of your home?
Would you like to design your own home?
